title: Glazed Crispy Mexican Kale Bake
description: A bitter, crispy, indulgent Mexican dish featuring gelatin leaf glaze and low‑calorie baked kale.

ingredients.name: gelatin sheets
ingredients.notes: soaked in 2 tbsp cold water then squeezed dry

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and grease a baking sheet.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, cumin, smoked paprika, chili powder, soy sauce, lime juice, agave nectar, and black pepper to create the glaze.
Toss the chopped kale and sliced green onions with the glaze until well coated.
Spread the kale mixture evenly on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 15 minutes, stirring halfway, until kale is crisp and edges are slightly charred.
While the kale is baking, soak the gelatin sheets in cold water for 5 minutes, then squeeze out excess water.
Warm the gelatin in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring until fully dissolved.
Remove the kale from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes before drizzling the warm gelatin glaze over the top.
Return the kale to the oven for an additional 5 minutes to set the glaze.
Remove from oven, let rest 3 minutes, then serve hot.
